open_prs.title: [Repo Assist] fix: increase L_ENV_POOL_SIZE from 128 to 512

notes: No human-authored issues. All previous PRs (#85-#94) merged by maintainer. This run: fixed l_setenv pool overflow (L_ENV_POOL_SIZE 128->512, caused CI test failures on runners with 127 env vars) and added word-at-a-time l_strchr. Next: word-at-a-time l_strcmp, buffered I/O helpers.
